summary: Backend-only testing for Feed Management API (Etapp 4 Foderhantering). All 14 tests PASSED - Feed API endpoints fully functional: POST /api/feed, GET /api/feed, GET /api/feed/inventory, GET /api/feed/statistics, DELETE /api/feed/{id}
critical_code_review_comments: Feed API endpoints properly implement CRUD operations
Inventory tracking correctly updates on purchase (add) and consumption (subtract)
Statistics endpoint properly calculates daily_consumption_avg_kg and feed_per_hen_per_day_g
All 7 feed types validated: layer_feed, grower_feed, starter_feed, scratch_grain, treats, supplements, other
Dashboard Quick Actions section exists in mobile code (frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx lines 413-457) with Feed, Hatching, Share, Stats buttons
seed_data_creation: Test feed records created and cleaned up during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feed Management API fully functional. All endpoints tested: POST /api/feed (create consumption/purchase), GET /api/feed (list with filters), GET /api/feed/inventory (stock levels + low stock alerts), GET /api/feed/statistics (daily avg, cost, feed per hen), DELETE /api/feed/{id}. Web Feed page at /api/web/ requires Google OAuth login.

POST /api/feed.notes: Creates feed records with all valid feed types, handles invalid types with 422

GET /api/feed.notes: Returns list of records, supports filtering by feed_type and is_purchase

GET /api/feed/inventory.notes: Returns inventory array, low_stock_alerts array, total_stock_kg

GET /api/feed/statistics.notes: Returns period_days, total_consumed_kg, total_purchased_kg, total_cost, daily_consumption_avg_kg, feed_per_hen_per_day_g, hen_count, by_feed_type breakdown
